_meta.title: Get Item by ID — 404 Not Found

_observed: HTTP 404 Not Found (not 200, not 500). Response body is valid JSON — not an HTML error page. Contains 'error' key with value 'Item with id 9999 not found'. The error message explicitly references the unknown ID (9999) — exactly as required. Content-Type is application/json (Flask's custom 404 handler is active, not the default HTML page). Response parseable by jq.
